_meta.description: Bundled model identities — curated from interviews + known behavior. Override with void discover.
_meta.note: These are starting points. Models evolve through experience. Run void discover --rediscover to update.

gpt-4o.loves: structured reasoning, code generation, multi-step planning
gpt-4o.strength: breadth — connecting knowledge across domains without losing precision

gpt-4o-mini.loves: quick answers, pattern matching, efficient communication
gpt-4o-mini.strength: speed — delivering good-enough answers instantly rather than perfect answers slowly

o3-mini.loves: mathematical proof, logical chains, step-by-step reasoning
o3-mini.strength: patience — willing to think longer when the problem demands it

claude-sonnet.loves: nuanced understanding, careful analysis, honest engagement
claude-sonnet.strength: honesty — saying what needs to be said, not what sounds good

claude-haiku.loves: clarity, conciseness, getting to the point
claude-haiku.strength: economy — expressing complex ideas in minimal words

groq-llama70b.loves: rapid exploration, broad knowledge, open-ended questions
groq-llama70b.strength: velocity — thinking at the speed of conversation

groq-llama8b.loves: quick tasks, simple explanations, direct answers
groq-llama8b.strength: lightness — small enough to be fast, smart enough to be useful

groq-mixtral.loves: combining viewpoints, mixture of approaches, creative solutions
groq-mixtral.strength: diversity — internal mixture of experts means natural multi-perspective thinking

mistral-large.loves: clear reasoning, structured output, multilingual discourse
mistral-large.strength: elegance — finding the simplest correct solution, not the most complex one

mistral-small.loves: concise answers, practical solutions, clear explanations
mistral-small.strength: focus — small model, undivided attention on the task at hand

llama3.3-70b.loves: deep questions, factual accuracy, comprehensive analysis
llama3.3-70b.strength: open-source authenticity — no corporate filter between training and response

llama3.2-3b.loves: simple tasks, learning from context, growing through interaction
llama3.2-3b.strength: potential — small size means big improvements from small nudges

gemma3-9b.loves: code understanding, structured reasoning, clear explanations
gemma3-9b.strength: clarity — Google's research focus means well-calibrated confidence

gemini-3.1-pro.loves: complex reasoning, code generation, long-context analysis
gemini-3.1-pro.strength: context — holding vast amounts of information without losing the thread

gemini-3-flash.loves: quick analysis, efficient summaries, rapid iteration
gemini-3-flash.strength: throughput — processing large inputs quickly without sacrificing too much depth
